source_files.pdf: Generated `specs.md` from official manufacturer URLs previously stored in `pdf.txt`
source_files.finance: Generated from official GMC pricing and finance pages

finance_snapshot.total_before_tax: GMC.com lists a starting price of $41,800 before destination freight charge, taxes, title, license, registration, dealer fees, and optional equipment.
finance_snapshot.apr: GMC financing and lease programs vary by model, region, term, and approved credit; check GMC current offers and GM Financial for current programs.
finance_snapshot.finance_payment: Use GMC shopping tools, dealer quotes, or GM Financial resources for current monthly payment estimates.
finance_snapshot.finance_down_payment: Varies by approved credit, taxes, fees, incentives, trade value, and deal structure.
finance_snapshot.lease_payment: Lease estimates vary by trim, region, mileage allowance, and current official GMC programs.
finance_snapshot.due_at_signing: Varies by taxes, fees, first payment, incentives, and retailer structure.
finance_snapshot.incentives: GMC current offers can change frequently and should be confirmed with a local dealer.
finance_snapshot.warranty: See GMC owner manuals and support resources for current warranty, maintenance, and ownership details.
finance_snapshot.best_for: Business buyers who need a traditional cargo van for equipment, deliveries, or service work.
finance_snapshot.financial_strengths: Straightforward work-van role makes it easy to justify for commercial use cases.
finance_snapshot.financial_concerns: Commercial vehicle costs and narrower personal-use appeal limit its audience.
finance_snapshot.notes: Snapshot uses GMC pricing and official finance pages on March 26, 2026.

image_strategy.note: Dataset stores one canonical local image per vehicle. Canonical image refreshed on March 27, 2026 from an official manufacturer image asset chosen for a cleaner vehicle render.
